fr:title.text: Associativity of the induced monad algebra ›

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Associativity of the induced monad algebra ›

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: We are trying to check that the following identity holds:

fr:title.text: Associativity of the induced monad algebra

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Associativity of the induced monad algebra

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: Let \mathbb {T} be a monad on a category \mathcal {C}, and let X be a weak algebra for \mathbb {T} for which the algebra map is invertible by {X}\xrightarrow {{\pi _{X}}}{TX}. Then the induced monad algebra \bar {X} is associative.
We are trying to check that the following identity holds:
